title: trashcan
description: throw your trash into the trashcan
body:
# **Trashcan
# ​**
Tired of cluttering your inventory with useless items? Fear not, for the Trashcan Plugin is here to save the day! Simply locate an oak sign, type '[trashcan]' on the top line, and voila! A magical portal to cleanliness opens before you. Toss in your unwanted items and watch them vanish into the digital abyss. It's the ultimate solution for tidying up your Minecraft world. So go ahead, throw your trash in the trashcan and let the adventures continue clutter-free!
